rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code residence homestead exemption amount. Educ. Code §33.009 governs postsecondary education and career counseling academies. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: The coordinating board shall develop and make available postsecondary education and career counseling academies for school counselors and other postsecondary advisors employed by a school district at a middle school, junior high school, or high school.
_note: No conflict identified; rule text is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption.
